scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server
scripts.deploy: [ -f server/src/data/countries.json ] || npm run generate -w server && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client && cd infra && npx cdk deploy --require-approval never
